meta.title: 时间和日期
meta.description: Basic time and date expressions in Chinese: telling time, days of the week, and dates.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 기초 시간과 날짜 표현: 시각 말하기, 요일, 날짜.

explanation.en: 「星期一」(xīngqīyī) means "Monday".

questions.prompt: 「星期一」是什么意思？(What does 星期一 mean?)

explanation.en: 「今天」(jīntiān) means "today".

questions.prompt: 「今天」是什么意思？(What does 今天 mean?)

explanation.en: 「昨天」(zuótiān) means "yesterday".

questions.prompt: 「昨天」的意思是____。

explanation.en: 「上午」means "morning (before noon)" and 「下午」means "afternoon (after noon)".
explanation.ko: 「上午」는 정오 이전(오전), 「下午」는 정오 이후(오후)를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「上午」和「下午」的区别是什么？
choices: 上午是中午之前，下午是中午之后
上午是晚上，下午是早上

explanation.en: 「几点」asks for the specific time (hour): "What time is it?"
explanation.ko: 「几点」은 구체적인 시각(몇 시)을 묻는 표현이다.

questions.prompt: 「几点」是用来问什么的？

explanation.en: 「星期几」asks which day of the week it is.

questions.prompt: 今天是星期___？(What day of the week is it today?)

explanation.en: 「就」here emphasizes the promptness of the action, though in a basic beginner sentence it can also simply be a time marker; 我七点就起床 = "I already get up at 7".

questions.prompt: 我早上七点___起床。(I get up at seven in the morning.)

explanation.en: 「点」is the measure word for the hour.

questions.prompt: 现在是下午三___。(It is now 3 pm.)

explanation.en: 「在」(zài) here marks the specific time when an action occurs: 在七点半 = "at 7:30".
explanation.ko: 「在」는 여기서 행동이 일어나는 구체적 시각을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 我们___七点半吃晚饭。(We eat dinner at 7:30.)

explanation.en: 「月」is used with 几 to ask which month: 几月几号 = "which month, which day".
explanation.ko: 「月」은 '几'와 함께 쓰여 몇 월인지 묻는다.

questions.prompt: 今天是几___几号？(What is today's date?)

explanation.en: 「下星期」means "next week".

questions.prompt: 下___我们去看电影。(Next week we're going to watch a movie.)

explanation.en: 「起床」(qǐchuáng) means "to get out of bed / wake up".

questions.prompt: 我每天早上六点半___。(I get up at 6:30 every morning.)

explanation.en: 「了」at the end of a time question softens the question, commonly used in casual speech: 现在几点了 = "What time is it now?"
explanation.ko: 「了」는 문장 끝에서 시간 질문을 부드럽게 만드는 데 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 现在几点___？(What time is it now?)

explanation.en: 「几月」asks which month.

questions.prompt: 我的生日在___月。(My birthday is in [which] month.)

explanation.en: 「都」(dōu) here means "usually/generally" in this context of habitual action.

questions.prompt: 周末我一般___在家休息。(On weekends I usually rest at home.)

explanation.en: 「到」(dào) means "to/until", pairing with 从 to indicate a range: 从〜到〜 = "from 〜 to 〜".

questions.prompt: 从星期一___星期五，我都要上班。(From Monday to Friday, I have to work.)

explanation.en: 「零」(líng) is used to indicate a leading zero in minute readings, e.g. 八点零十分 = "8:10".
explanation.ko: 「零」(líng)은 분을 읽을 때 앞자리가 0일 때 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 现在是晚上八点___十分。(It is now 8:10 pm.)

explanation.en: 「生日」(shēngrì) means "birthday".

questions.prompt: 明天是我的___。(Tomorrow is my birthday.)

explanation.en: 「在」marks a specific point in time when an event happens.

questions.prompt: 我们___晚上七点开会。(We have a meeting at 7 pm.)

explanation.en: 「就」here means "right away/immediately", indicating the action follows promptly.
explanation.ko: 「就」는 여기서 '바로, 곧'이라는 뜻으로 즉각적인 행동을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 下课以后，我___回家。(After class, I go straight home.)

explanation.en: 「是」must come right after 今天, before 星期几; the correct order is 今天是星期几？
explanation.ko: 「是」는 '今天' 바로 뒤, '星期几' 앞에 와야 하므로 올바른 어순은 '今天是星期几？'이다.

questions.prompt: 今天星期几是？(What day of the week is it today?) — find the error

explanation.en: The measure word 「点」should only appear once, right after the number: 七点 (not repeated at the end).
explanation.ko: 양사 「点」은 숫자 바로 뒤에 한 번만 와야 하며 문장 끝에 다시 쓰면 안 된다.

questions.prompt: 我七点起床点。(I get up at seven.) — find the error

explanation.en: 「到」should appear only once, before the ending point 星期五; repeating it is an error.
explanation.ko: 「到」는 종점인 '星期五' 앞에 한 번만 와야 하며 중복하면 오류이다.

questions.prompt: 从星期一到到星期五。(From Monday to Friday.) — find the error

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 今天是星期一 ("Today is Monday").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '今天是星期一' (오늘은 월요일이다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 今天__________。(Today is Monday.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我们在七点半吃晚饭 ("We eat dinner at 7:30"), using 在 to mark the time.
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我们在七点半吃晚饭' (우리는 7시 반에 저녁을 먹는다)이 되며 '在'로 시각을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 我们__________七点半吃晚饭。(We eat dinner at 7:30.)
